channel.title: SPL - Beacon Hill Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Beacon Hill Branch

item.title: English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Beacon Hill Branch, Meeting Room

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.مارس لغتك الإنجليزية.دینک نیرمت ار دوخ یسیلگنا.ئړک نیرمت يسیلګنا هلپخПрактикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

Event details

item.title: La Hora de Cuentos
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Beacon Hill Branch, Área para niños

Durante la hora de cuentos, los niños de 0 a 5 años y sus familias pueden disfrutar de historias, canciones y divertidas actividades de aprendizaje. Evento en español.

Event details

item.title: Kaleidoscope Play & Learn / 万花筒游戏和学习@笔架山分店 / 萬花筒遊戲和學習@筆架山分店
item.description:
Tuesday, March 17, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Beacon Hill Branch, Meeting Room

Children listen to multilingual stories, sing songs and do simple arts and crafts with their caregivers during the group time. There is also a play time for children to explore various toys and play activities.Event is in English and Mandarin.-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------萬花筒邊玩邊學®: 孩子與他們的照顧者在小組中一起聽多種語言故事、唱歌並做簡單的手工。萬花筒邊玩邊學®也是一個提供孩子們探索各種玩具和遊戲活動的時間。本活動將以國語和英語進行。-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------万花筒边玩边学®: 孩子与他们的照顾者在小组中一起听多种语言故事、唱歌并做简单的手工。万花筒边玩边学®也是一个提供給孩子们探索各种玩具和游戏活动的时间。本次活动将以普通话和英语进行。

Event details

item.title: Office Hours with Department of Neighborhoods
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Beacon Hill Branch

The City of Seattle’s Department of Neighborhoods (DON) will be holding office hours as part of their "Meeting Community Where They Are At" Initiative.

Event details

item.title: BMO Bank Financial Progress Presentation
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Beacon Hill Branch

Learn how to build your financial knowledge, develop healthy money habits, and strengthen your banking relationship. 

Event details

item.title: Denkyem Drop In and CoLab
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Beacon Hill Branch, Lobby

Join Denkyem staff and a business librarian to update your business plan with industry insights, access market research, or bounce ideas off the like-minded entrepreneurs. Let's CoLab!

Event details

item.title: Toddler Story Time
item.description:
Friday, March 20, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Beacon Hill Branch, Meeting Room

At toddler story time, kids ages 1-3 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.

Event details

item.title: La Hora de Cuentos
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Beacon Hill Branch, Área para niños

Durante la hora de cuentos, los niños de 0 a 5 años y sus familias pueden disfrutar de historias, canciones y divertidas actividades de aprendizaje. Evento en español.

Event details

item.title: Kaleidoscope Play & Learn / 万花筒游戏和学习@笔架山分店 / 萬花筒遊戲和學習@筆架山分店
item.description:
Tuesday, March 24, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Beacon Hill Branch, Meeting Room

Children listen to multilingual stories, sing songs and do simple arts and crafts with their caregivers during the group time. There is also a play time for children to explore various toys and play activities.Event is in English and Mandarin.-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------萬花筒邊玩邊學®: 孩子與他們的照顧者在小組中一起聽多種語言故事、唱歌並做簡單的手工。萬花筒邊玩邊學®也是一個提供孩子們探索各種玩具和遊戲活動的時間。本活動將以國語和英語進行。-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------万花筒边玩边学®: 孩子与他们的照顾者在小组中一起听多种语言故事、唱歌并做简单的手工。万花筒边玩边学®也是一个提供給孩子们探索各种玩具和游戏活动的时间。本次活动将以普通话和英语进行。

Event details
